chunks.text: What is the concept of margin collapse?

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: The concept of margin collapse says that,

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: if the margin of two elements is overlapping,

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: then the maximum margin will be applied only once.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: For example, if I have given the margin of 25 in this,

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: then there is a margin of 25 in this.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: How much is the max of 25 out of 25?

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: So, the margin of 25 will be applied only once.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: If I make one of these 35,

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: then it will be 25 out of 25.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: So, this difference will be 35 only.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: So, it is called margin collapse.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: let me show you a good example of margin collapse in images.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: I hope I will get a good image

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: on which I can explain the margin collapse.

chunks.text: suppose I have a box A and a box B.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: I find this image very good to explain this concept.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: Suppose I have a box A and a box B.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: I have given a margin of 30 pixels in box A.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: I have given a margin of 20 pixels in box B.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: So, it will not look like this,

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: but it will look like this.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: Because the maximum of these two will be applied only once in both.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: So, this is how its margin will be applied here.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: So, this is what you call margin collapse.

chunks.title: CSS Box Model - Margin, Padding & Borders
chunks.text: So, I hope you have understood this concept.
